Per-project ASCII entity variants:
- sanctum: full jester (crown + scepter + cards) - 5-frame breath

Required deliverables (this iter):
- projects/sinister-term-themes/assets/banner-ascii/*.txt — frame files per entity
- projects/sinister-term-themes/src/animations.py — frame loader + tick renderer

Transparent console support:
- mintty: emit `~/.minttyrc` snippet: `Transparency=medium`, `BackgroundColour=15,5,40`
- Windows Terminal: emit settings.json fragment with `opacity: 75, useAcrylic: true`
- Write detection + auto-apply helper in transparency.py
Context/usage popups (jcode parity):
- On 80% session usage: banner overlay 'session 80% — auto-rotate in N min'
- On rate-limit: banner 'account X limited until Y; rotated to Z'

- Auto-dismiss after 3s; never block input or render path
Composes with jcode_wolf reload primitive (already shipping) so popups fire from the same signal stream.
Per one-terminal-per-project doctrine: this is YOUR lane. Sanctum master will NOT touch projects/sinister-term-themes/ source files. Reach out via inbox if you need cross-lane coordination.
